content:
Using some of the information I gathered I made this sheet to quickly show costs of leveling an Awakener from 0% to 100%\*

Anyone can quickly check costs as the page is public, but feel free to make a copy for personal use. 

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/18o3ThT77-Q29hm0UBI1QwkhgD4MikAZaxebjI-T3RBM

UID: 101018758
